data.description:
Document the remediation re-review and prove it offline. Add a `docs/plan-review-gate.md`
section, and FakeRunner tests covering convergence on a remediation edit (novel low-stakes
dropped, carryover enforced, novel high-stakes preserved) plus every precondition fallback
to a byte-identical full review (code drift, window expiry, registry skew, no/old sidecar,
config off).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `docs/plan-review-gate.md` section on the rising-floor remediation re-review
- [ ] FakeRunner test: convergence on a remediation edit in `tests/unit/`
- [ ] FakeRunner tests: each precondition fallback -> full review
- [ ] Test: novel high-stakes preserved; carryover still enforced
data.title: Docs + offline convergence tests for remediation re-review
